back_translation: A psalm of David. To You, O LORD, I call; O my Rock, do not be silent toward me, for if You remain silent, I will become like those who go down to the pit.
Hear the voice of my supplications when I cry to You for help, when I lift up my hands toward the holy inner sanctuary of Your temple.
Do not drag me away with the wicked and with the workers of evil, who speak peace with their neighbors while malice is in their hearts.
Repay them according to their deeds and according to the evil of their actions; repay them according to the work of their hands; render to them what they deserve.
Because they show no regard for the works of the LORD, He will tear them down and never rebuild them, because they pay no heed to the work of His hands.
Blessed be the LORD, for He has heard the voice of my supplications.
The LORD is my strength and my shield; my heart trusts in Him, and I am helped; therefore my heart leaps for joy, and I will sing thanks to Him.
The LORD is the strength of His people, and He is a stronghold of salvation for His anointed.
Save Your people and bless Your inheritance; shepherd them and carry them forever.
